Task chair family featuring ergonomic mesh backrest, adjustable lumbar support, and multiple base options. Signature X-shaped lumbar support.
Clean-lined desk and bench system with cable management and height-adjustable options.

The NARBUTAS Arc Coffee Table is a versatile low-height surface designed for lounge areas, reception zones, and executive offices. It features a distinctive curved metal base that provides a light and elegant aesthetic. Available with various top finishes including MFC, HPL Fenix, and natural veneer, and offered in multiple sizes, it serves as a functional and stylish accent piece.

The NARBUTAS Arcipelago Bench is a versatile modular soft seating system designed for public, collaborative, and waiting areas. It allows for diverse configurations, from straight lines to complex island formations, adapting to various spatial needs. Featuring comfortable upholstered elements, it can be optionally integrated with tables, power modules, and backrests, promoting both relaxation and informal interaction.

T-Meeting is a modular table system designed for collaborative workspaces, meeting rooms, and conference areas. It features a clean, minimalist design with various tabletop shapes and sizes available. The system allows for easy reconfiguration and expansion to accommodate different meeting sizes and needs. Options include integrated power and data management solutions.

A versatile and stylish seating collection designed for collaborative spaces, meeting rooms, and breakout areas. Rondo features a distinctive circular base and a comfortable, upholstered seat, available in various heights and finishes. It promotes informal interaction and adds a touch of modern elegance to any environment. Available as a high stool, low stool, or lounge chair.
Twist & Sit Bench (AI Suggested)

The NARBUTAS Lumina is a versatile task chair designed for ergonomic support and comfort. It features a breathable mesh back, adjustable lumbar support, and a range of customizable options including armrests, seat depth, and headrest. The chair is suitable for various office environments and promotes healthy posture during extended work sessions.

NARBUTAS NL-100 is a modular storage system, typically consisting of cabinets, shelves, and drawers. It's designed for office environments, offering flexible configurations for various storage needs. Features often include adjustable shelves, lockable drawers, and a range of finishes to match different office aesthetics.
NWS-80160NP (AI Suggested)

Flow by NARBUTAS

EIRA is an office chair designed by Alegre Design to meet the demand for ergonomic, adaptable, and cost-efficient seating solutions in contemporary workplaces. It combines a light form and functionality into a cohesive aesthetic, ensuring intuitive comfort and promoting a healthier sitting posture. The chair features an ergonomically shaped backrest, a weight-sensitive synchronous mechanism, adjustable lumbar support, and optional 2D or 3D armrests and headrest. Up to 43% of its components are made from recycled materials, making it a conscious choice for sustainable workspaces.

OPTIMA is an optimal office furniture line which allows you to create a comfortable, functional and well-organized work environment using minimum components. The system includes panel end legs with levelling feet which provides stability on uneven flooring. Desktops are available in various configurations including rectangular, left- or right-handed, corner, or wave shapes.

KOPA by NARBUTAS is a sophisticated soft furniture collection designed by Folco Orlandini, offering a subtle form of everyday luxury for modern office and lounge spaces. Inspired by sand dunes, the collection features gracefully contoured silhouettes and gently voluminous forms, encompassing sofas, lounge chairs, and armchairs. It offers 360-degree comfort, with options for two-tone upholstery and various bases, including solid ash wood or modern metal legs for sofas and lounge chairs, and up to six different bases for armchairs.

The DIVA task chair is designed for intensive, long-duration work, providing dynamic sitting positions, exceptional comfort, and ease of use. It features ergonomic adjustments like a height-adjustable backrest, sliding seat, depth-adjustable polyurethane lumbar support, and options for fixed or 3D adjustable armrests. The chair is available with either a black polyamide or polished aluminum 5-star base with castors.
Unfortunately, I was unable to find more information on the product.
Unfortunately, I was unable to find a product description for the NARBUTAS Sento chair.

The Vento 8820 is a high-quality task chair designed for comfort and durability. It features a sturdy frame, adjustable armrests, and a breathable mesh backrest. The chair is designed to provide optimal support and comfort for long periods of sitting.
Denda is a versatile and ergonomic office chair designed for long hours of comfortable sitting. The chair features a breathable mesh backrest, adjustable lumbar support, and a durable metal frame.

SKY 90R is a high-back executive chair with a synchronous mechanism, adjustable lumbar support, and a headrest. The chair features a sturdy aluminum frame, a breathable mesh backrest, and a comfortable, contoured seat.

SALIDA M is a compact and ergonomic lounge chair designed for modern workspaces. It features a sturdy frame, comfortable cushioning, and a sleek design that fits seamlessly into any office environment.

The Soho Head Desk is a part of the Soho collection by NARBUTAS. The Soho collection is designed to create a comfortable and functional workspace. The Soho Head Desk is a versatile and ergonomic solution for modern offices.

Omega 2 is a high-quality executive chair designed for comfort and durability. It features a sturdy frame, adjustable armrests, and a breathable mesh backrest. The chair is designed to provide excellent support and comfort for long hours of work.

ECHO C - a high-back executive chair designed for top-level executives. Ergonomic design, adjustable lumbar support, and a high back provide comfort during long working hours. The chair's design emphasizes the user's status and creates an atmosphere of trust.
Unfortunately, I was unable to find a product description for this item.

CIFF 30 is a chair designed for conference rooms and auditoriums. The chair has a sturdy metal frame, upholstered seat and backrest. The model is available with or without armrests, and can be customized with various upholstery materials and colors.
Unfortunately, I was unable to find the product details for this item.

Cloakroom system Plaza is designed for public spaces where functionality and durability are crucial. The system consists of modules that can be combined to create a customized solution. Plaza is made of high-quality materials and is designed to withstand heavy use.

Locker S is a compact and versatile storage solution designed for modern workspaces. It features a minimalist design with a focus on functionality and can be easily integrated into various office environments.

The Narbutas Lobby Chair Model LC-101 is a sleek and modern chair designed for lobby and reception areas. It features a sturdy base and a comfortable, ergonomic design. The chair is available in a range of upholstery options and can be customized to fit your specific needs.

The NARBUTAS POLYTONE-L is a versatile visitor, conference, and dining chair with a subtle, minimalist design. Part of the broader POLYTONE collection, which includes the POLYTONE-C and POLYTONE-O models, the POLYTONE-L is designed to create a balance of style and functionality for modern work environments. The chair is made from high-grade polypropylene plastic, which is valued for its durability, easy maintenance, and malleability, allowing for complex design shapes. The POLYTONE-L is available in a multitude of options, including various base types such as a powder-coated steel four-leg frame (with or without castors or armrests), a sled frame, and a high chair version. An optional fixed upholstered seat cushion is available for added comfort, with a wide range of fabric choices. The chairs are stackable, and a trolley is available for easy transport. Designed by Scagnellato and Ferrarese Design, the POLYTONE-L chairs can be integrated into various office settings for meetings, collaborative work, and conferences.
products.price: Price available upon request from dealers.

products.description: The NARBUTAS SURF is a task chair distinguished by its appealing backrest silhouette that resembles a windsurfing sail. Designed by Justus Kolberg, the chair is intended to provide a blend of excellent design and ergonomic comfort. Key features include a breathable mesh backrest with a distinctive three-dimensional structure, height-adjustable lumbar support, and a synchro mechanism that harmonizes the movement of the seat and backrest. The chair offers various adjustments for individual comfort, such as 2D or 3D armrests, seat depth adjustment, and tilt tension control. The SURF chair is available in a wide palette of colors and is designed to fit into both office and home environments.

A traditional and universal chair designed for conference halls, collaboration rooms, waiting zones, or eating areas. GAMA features three available steel bases: a 4-leg base, a cantilever frame, or a 4-leg base with castors, which can be chromed or powder-coated. The backrest can be upholstered with either fabric in two different heights or two types of mesh for breathability and support.

The EVA task chair features a graceful shape emphasized by the integrity of the backrest and seat. The backrest is made of a light, breathable polyester mesh that adapts to the curves of the back for comfortable support and air circulation. The chair has a tilting mechanism where the backrest and seat are connected, which can be locked in four different positions, and the stiffness can be adjusted. Options include fixed or 2D armrests and a choice of a black or white plastic body with a polished aluminum or black plastic base.

The FORUM coffee table features a classic, round design ideal for reception areas, relaxation zones, or informal meeting spaces. Its round tabletop and stable metal base ensure efficient use of space and durability. The tabletop is constructed from 25 mm MFC (melamine) with 2 mm ABS edging, and the powder-coated metal base is available in various colors to complement any interior.
Product not found. Unable to retrieve description.

The specific product "VYTIS" by NARBUTAS could not be found on Architonic or the brand's official website. Searches for this name did not yield any furniture products, suggesting it may be a discontinued item, a special project, or not a public-facing product name. The name "Vytis" is the Lithuanian national coat of arms.

TANGO is a family of soft seating furniture with a visually striking Scandinavian design, created by the Danish design duo Christina Strand and Niels Hvass. The collection, which includes visitor, conference, and lounge chairs with high or low backrests, is characterized by minimalist, clean lines and a distinctive 'smile' detail in its construction. The frame is made of steel molded with polyurethane and can be upholstered in various fabrics or leather looks, supported by a range of base options including metal and natural or stained ash wood.

The VEGAS lounge chair features a curved shape with a lower and wider seating area for a welcoming and comfortable experience. It is available with two seat design options: horizontal stitches or a single connecting stitch. The base is a durable chromed or powder-coated steel, and upholstery is offered in fabric, leather look, or genuine leather.

ACTIVE is an electric height-adjustable desking system designed for functionality and quality, allowing users to easily switch between sitting and standing. The desk height is adjustable via a control panel with memory settings and features an anti-collision sensor to prevent damage. It is available with 2-level (723-1193 mm) or 3-level (642-1292 mm) columns, offering different height adjustment ranges to suit individual ergonomic needs.

Designed by Annie Lee, the ZooZoo collection addresses the challenge of comfortable, informal meetings in lounge areas. The table stands at an atypical height of 69 cm, optimized for use while seated on a sofa. Its modern, lightweight design includes a range of coffee and meeting tables with complementary poufs that tuck neatly underneath, offering a space-efficient solution that encourages collaboration.

The product 'N/A' by NARBUTAS is not a recognized or listed product in the official NARBUTAS catalog or on their website. NARBUTAS offers a wide range of office furniture including desks, chairs, storage, acoustic solutions, and lounge furniture, but 'N/A' does not correspond to any specific model or collection.

The KOPA Lounge chair, part of the KOPA collection by NARBUTAS and designed by Orlandini Design, offers sophisticated soft seating for modern workspaces. Inspired by sand dunes, it features rounded, gently voluminous forms that create a sense of warmth and comfort. This collection emphasizes emotional well-being, providing a subtle form of everyday luxury with options for two-tone upholstery and various bases, including solid ash wood or modern metal legs.

products.model: Twist & Sit Lounge Chair (Low Backrest, Wooden Legs)
products.description: The NARBUTAS TWIST&SIT Soft lounge chair, designed by Christina Strand and Niels Hvass, is part of a Red Dot Product Design Award-winning collection. This low-back armchair features a distinctive design with well-rounded shapes and a unique connection between the lower and upper parts of the backrest. Crafted with increased polyurethane padding for enhanced comfort, it is ideal for creating a relaxing atmosphere in office reception areas, open-plan relaxation spaces, or informal meeting zones. The model specified has solid ash wooden legs, with dimensions of W 725mm × D 710mm × H 820mm × SH 395mm.

No product details for 'SE Kit' by NARBUTAS could be found on official NARBUTAS channels or reputable secondary sources like Architonic. It is possible this is not a publicly marketed product name, a component, or a misremembered name.

The TWIST&SIT Soft collection by NARBUTAS, designed by Christina Strand and Niels Hvass, offers lounge chairs and sofas with a visually striking Scandinavian design. This soft seating family is ideal for modern offices, reception areas, relaxation zones, and informal meeting spaces, providing a homely feel and encouraging both individual focus and collaboration. Available in various sizes (one, two, or three-seater) and with low-back or high-back versions, the collection features well-rounded shapes, distinctive stitching, and increased polyurethane padding for enhanced comfort.

products.logic: The official product page for the NARBUTAS D-CHAIR was found on narbutas.com [2]. The image URL was extracted directly from this page, showcasing the executive version of the chair. The category 'Office Seating' and sub-category 'Executive Chairs' were chosen based on the product description on the official website, which explicitly refers to it as an 'executive chair' and part of a collection that includes executive and task chairs [2, 4].

The official product page for 'NARBUTAS VEGAS Lounge Chair' was found on narbutas.com. The imageUrl was extracted directly from the product page, and the category and subCategory were determined based on the product name and description on the official website.

The NARBUTAS OFY is a collection of office chairs, including task, executive, and visitor chairs. The official Narbutas website provides a dedicated page for the OFY task chair, which also describes the broader collection. This page is used as the websiteUrl. The category is 'Office Seating' as it's a chair collection for office environments. 'Task Chairs' is chosen as the sub-category because the provided websiteUrl specifically highlights the task chair variant, which is a central part of the OFY collection. The imageUrl was found by searching for high-resolution images of 'NARBUTAS OFY task chair' on the Narbutas domain, leading to a direct image file from their website.

The official NARBUTAS website was identified as the primary source. The product page for 'NORTH CAPE executive chairs' was located, providing the websiteUrl. A direct image URL for a high-resolution executive chair image was found on the Narbutas website. The categories were determined based on the product description, which consistently refers to it as an executive office chair.

The official product page for NARBUTAS Eva.II Executive Chair was found on narbutas.com. The image URL was extracted by navigating to the product page and inspecting the main product image. The category and sub-category were determined directly from the product name and the content of the official website.

The official product page for NARBUTAS TWIST&SIT Soft lounge chairs and sofas was found on narbutas.com [1]. The provided imageUrl is a direct link to a high-resolution image of the TWIST&SIT Soft collection, which includes the one-seater armchair, found on the Narbutas website. The product clearly falls under 'Office Seating' and specifically 'Lounge Chairs' based on its description as a 'one-seater armchair' within a collection of 'lounge chairs and sofas' designed for office settings [1].
